overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, holographic billboards, and futuristic architecture. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, with heavy rain creating reflective wet surfaces and atmospheric haze throughout the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking across wet crosswalk in heavy rain, approaching covered sidewalk area

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead
modern multi-story building with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade
tall street light with bright overhead illumination cutting through rain

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-soaked urban intersection at night, with the camera positioned at a crosswalk. Heavy rain creates reflective surfaces on the asphalt while street lamps cast bright glows through the downpour. The camera moves forward across the crosswalk and transitions into a covered walkway beneath an elevated overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass, passing beneath holographic billboards and support structures

entered.detail: multiple floating holographic advertisements displaying various products and animations
massive concrete columns supporting the overhead highway structure
wall-mounted digital screens showing advertisements on the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered from the rain. Holographic billboards float overhead on the right side, casting colorful light onto the wet pavement. The space is defined by massive concrete support pillars on the left and digital advertisement panels lining the right wall, creating a cyberpunk corridor atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with fast food storefronts

events.description: passing pedestrian with illuminated orange umbrella walking toward camera

agents.ego_description: walking past neon storefronts including a burrito shop, briefly encountering a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera carrying an illuminated orange umbrella

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with bright red and green neon signage reading BURRITO
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street
building with distinctive curved facade and purple neon accent lighting
large digital advertisement screen displaying a cola brand with red and white colors

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass area, the scene opens onto a neon-drenched commercial street. A prominent burrito shop with bright red and green neon signage dominates the right side, while a curved building with purple neon trim rises on the left. The camera passes a pedestrian carrying an illuminated orange umbrella walking in the opposite direction, adding a human element to the rainy urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with scattered pedestrians and large vertical billboards

events.description: passing pedestrian with purple illuminated umbrella standing near crosswalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the rain-soaked street, passing pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas and observing distant billboards

notable_agents.action: standing at crosswalk holding a purple illuminated umbrella

entered.detail: tall digital billboard structure displaying advertisements high above the street
low concrete wall with red and white panels separating sidewalk from road
weathered industrial building with metal panels and ventilation units

segments.scene_description: The final stretch continues along the wet sidewalk past scattered pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas. A large vertical billboard tower rises in the distance, while the curved neon-lit building recedes into the background. The street is lined with industrial building facades on the right and concrete barriers, maintaining the dense urban cyberpunk atmosphere as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked urban intersection into a sheltered cyberpunk corridor and finally out onto a neon-drenched commercial street. It begins at a crosswalk where heavy rain creates reflective asphalt, moving forward through the downpour before transitioning into a covered walkway beneath a massive elevated overpass. As the environment becomes more enclosed, the camera glides past concrete support pillars and floating holographic billboards that cast colorful light across the wet pavement. The scene then opens back into the rain, passing a burrito shop with bright red and green signage and a pedestrian with an illuminated orange umbrella. Finally, the camera continues along the wet sidewalk past further pedestrians and industrial facades, moving toward a large vertical billboard tower that rises in the distance.
